News and Updates

JUL 2026
people
Welcome new members: Fu Jieling, Han Moqi, and Zhou Yi joined the lab!
We warmly welcome Fu Jieling, Han Moqi, and Zhou Yi as new members of the Functional Genomics Lab. We look forward to great science together!
JUL 2026
announcement
Lab has moved to Room 516, New Biology Building, Jiangning Campus
The Functional Genomics Lab is now located at Room 516, New Biology Building (新生物楼516室), Jiangning Campus, China Pharmaceutical University.
APR 2026
position
Joined China Pharmaceutical University
Started as Professor (Ph.D. Advisor) at China Pharmaceutical University in April 2026.
